name: C/p Steak Roulade
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat off steaks.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Mix onion and bacon, spreading over each steak.
4. Roll steaks (as for a jelly roll) and tie tightly in several places with a string.
5. Place steaks into slow cooker.
6. Add water.
7. Cover pot.
8. Cook on LOW for 8 hours.
9. To serve with gravy, remove meat when done.
10. Thicken the liquid by mixing flour and water, then cook it in the crockpot set at High for 15 minutes.
